female.name: Kebaya Jawa
female.description: Traditional Javanese kebaya blouse with batik jarik skirt wrap. Deep indigo and brown batik parang motif. Elegant fitted lace-trimmed kebaya in soft cream or pastel colors paired with a batik kain jarik wrapped around the waist. Accessorized with golden jewelry, sanggul hair bun, and selendang scarf.
female.accessories: gold jewelry, sanggul bun, selendang scarf, kebaya shoes

female.name: Kebaya Kartini
female.description: Elegant kebaya inspired by Raden Ajeng Kartini, a Javanese national heroine. Long-sleeved fitted lace kebaya in white or soft colors paired with batik jarik wrap skirt. Adorned with gold brooches and jasmine flower hair accessories.
female.accessories: gold brooches, jasmine hair accessories, gold necklace, kebaya heels

male.name: Beskap Jawa
male.description: Traditional Javanese formal male attire. A fitted collarless jacket (beskap) in dark fabric with batik kain jarik wrap around the waist. Worn with blangkon batik headwrap, keris dagger tucked at the back. Rich brown and dark blue tones with Sido Mukti batik motif.
male.accessories: blangkon headwrap, keris dagger, batik sash, traditional sandals

male.name: Surjan Lurik
male.description: Traditional Javanese male shirt made from lurik woven fabric. Collarless button-front shirt in striped lurik pattern paired with batik jarik sarong. Modest and elegant traditional daily wear from Central Java.

female.name: Kebaya Sunda
female.description: Sundanese kebaya from West Java, known for vibrant colors. Bright and colorful fitted kebaya paired with batik Sunda or kain lilit wrap. Features rich embroidery and bright floral details. Often in bright green, orange, or red colors with intricate Sunda floral batik motifs.
female.accessories: siger crown, flower hairpiece, gold jewelry, selendang

female.name: Kebaya Pangsi Sunda
female.description: Traditional Sundanese female outfit featuring a colorful kebaya with pangsi-style kain wrap. Known for its bright, cheerful colors and intricate embroidery representing Sundanese artistic culture.
female.accessories: siger crown headpiece, gold necklace, flower ornaments

male.name: Pangsi Sunda
male.description: Traditional Sundanese male outfit consisting of a plain white or light-colored shirt tucked into black or dark-colored loose pants (pangsi), with a sarong wrapped around the waist. Completed with iket kepala head cloth tied in traditional style.
male.accessories: iket kepala head cloth, batik sarong, sandal tarumpah

female.name: Kebaya Bali
female.description: Elegant Balinese lace kebaya in vibrant colors paired with kain endek or songket woven fabric. The outfit includes a colorful sash (selendang) tied around the waist. The kebaya is often white, pink, or bright-colored with golden accessories. Women wear flower ornaments in their hair.
female.accessories: golden flower hairpiece, gold jewelry, colorful selendang sash, traditional sandals

female.name: Payas Agung Bali
female.description: The most formal and elaborate Balinese female ceremonial dress. Features gold-threaded songket cloth wrapped around the body, an ornate golden crown (gelungan), elaborate gold jewelry, and a long golden sash. The entire outfit shimmers with gold and jewel tones.
female.accessories: elaborate golden gelungan crown, full gold jewelry set, gold-trimmed accessories

male.name: Pakaian Adat Bali Pria
male.description: Traditional Balinese male ceremonial attire: white shirt (kemeja putih), udeng headband tied formally, kain kampuh or saput batik-endek draped over the waist, and a kancut fabric tuck at front. A golden sash is tied around the waist. Dignified and elegant ceremonial look.
colors: Endek in earth tones or bright colors
male.accessories: udeng headband, kris dagger, golden sash, traditional sandals

female.name: Pakaian Adat Batak Wanita
female.description: Traditional Batak female attire featuring the sacred ulos woven textile draped over the shoulder or wrapped around the body. Rich red, black, and white geometric patterns on hand-woven ulos cloth. Paired with a matching woven skirt wrap. Gold and silver jewelry complete the ceremonial look.
female.accessories: gold headpiece, silver and gold jewelry, ulos draped over shoulder

male.name: Pakaian Adat Batak Pria
male.description: Traditional Batak male ceremonial attire with ulos textile wrapped and draped across the body. Features a mandarin collar shirt with ulos cloth draped over the shoulder and wrapped at the waist. Bold geometric red, black, and white patterns on woven ulos fabric. Dignified ceremonial appearance.
male.accessories: gold headpiece or songkok hat, gold jewelry, ulos drape

female.name: Bundo Kanduang
female.description: The iconic and regal Minangkabau female traditional dress. Features a distinctive large wing-shaped gold headpiece (tengkuluk tanduk or suntiang), a dark silk brocade jacket with gold trimming, embroidered sarong with songket gold threads, and a colorful long shawl. The suntiang crown is the most distinctive element, towering over the head like buffalo horns.
female.accessories: large suntiang gold crown, full gold jewelry set, songket wrap, embroidered shawl

male.name: Baju Taluak Balango Minang
male.description: Traditional Minangkabau male formal attire. Consists of a long-sleeved embroidered jacket (baju taluak balango) with gold thread embroidery on black fabric, baggy pants (sarawa), a songket verse cloth draped at the waist, and a traditional destar or tanjak headwrap. Elegant and dignified appearance.
male.accessories: tanjak or destar headwrap, songket sash, traditional keris, gold embroidered accessories

female.name: Baju Bodo Bugis
female.description: The ancient and elegant Bugis/Makassar traditional female dress. A short, wide, and sheer square-cut blouse in shimmering silk fabric, worn over a sarong. The translucent colorful silk (organza) top in bright colors like red, orange, green, or purple creates a flowing, ethereal look. Adorned with elaborate gold jewelry.
female.accessories: gold crown and hair ornaments, full gold jewelry, lipa sabbe silk sarong

male.name: Jas Tutu / Baju Bella Bugis
male.description: Traditional Bugis male formal attire featuring a fitted jacket with golden buttons over a white inner shirt, paired with a silk sarong wrapped at the waist. A distinctive turban-like headwrap (passapu) completes the look. Rich silk fabric in dark or deep colors with golden accents.
male.accessories: passapu headwrap, gold accessories, lipa sabbe silk sarong, traditional keris

female.name: Pakaian Adat Dayak Wanita
female.description: Vibrant and ornate Dayak female traditional costume from Borneo. Features a colorful beaded top decorated with intricate bead patterns, a fringed skirt with colorful beadwork, and a cone-shaped hat (sugu tinggi) adorned with feathers. The costume is rich in symbolic tribal motifs and natural materials. Feather decorations on hair and accessories.
female.accessories: sugu tinggi feathered hat, beaded necklaces and bracelets, feather decorations

male.name: Pakaian Adat Dayak Pria
male.description: Bold and striking Dayak male warrior traditional costume from Borneo. Features a vest or open top adorned with beadwork and feathers, a short loincloth-style wrap with fringe, arm and leg bands, and an elaborate feathered headdress. Tribal tattoo-inspired painted patterns on exposed skin. Carries traditional mandau sword.
male.accessories: elaborate feathered headdress with hornbill feathers, mandau sword, beaded accessories, arm bands

female.name: Kebaya Encim Betawi
female.description: Elegant Betawi Peranakan Chinese-influenced kebaya from Jakarta. Features a colorful embroidered short kebaya with floral embroidery in a Peranakan style, paired with a batik skirt. Vibrant colors like pink, green, and blue. The embroidery is distinctive with floral and butterfly motifs. Also known as kebaya nyonya.
female.accessories: floral hair accessories, gold brooches, peranakan porcelain-bead accessories

male.name: Baju Sadariah Betawi
male.description: Traditional Betawi male attire from Jakarta. Features a plain white or bright-colored long-sleeved mandarin collar shirt (sadariah) paired with batik sarong and a songkok/peci hat. A simple but dignified traditional look representing Jakarta's multicultural heritage.
male.accessories: songkok/peci black cap, batik sarong, sandal selop

female.name: Tenun Ikat NTT Wanita
female.description: Beautiful handwoven ikat textile dress from East Nusa Tenggara (NTT). Features a wrap-around handwoven ikat cloth with bold geometric and natural motifs in earthy tones. The intricate ikat weaving process creates unique patterns symbolizing local beliefs and nature. Often worn as a full wrap dress or blouse with matching wrap skirt.
female.accessories: beaded necklaces, silver jewelry, traditional hair combs

male.name: Tenun Ikat NTT Pria
male.description: Traditional male attire from East Nusa Tenggara featuring handwoven ikat cloth. A woven ikat shawl (selimut) draped over the shoulder and a woven wrap cloth (sarong) around the waist. Bold geometric patterns in earthy, natural dye colors. Often includes a distinctive woven headband.
male.accessories: iket woven headband, silver or brass accessories, carved wooden or bone ornaments

female.name: Baju Cele Wanita
female.description: The iconic traditional female dress from Maluku. Features a striking red and white striped patterned baju cele blouse paired with a tapis woven cloth skirt. Often includes a ruffled white collar. The bold red and white stripes are the hallmark of Malukan traditional dress, representing courage and purity.
female.accessories: konde hair bun with golden pins, sanggul, golden jewelry set

male.name: Pakaian Adat Maluku Pria
male.description: Traditional Maluku male ceremonial dress. Features a white shirt with red collar and trim details, a red cloth wrap at the waist, and a topi tiga negeri hat. Dignified and proud appearance representing the Malukan heritage from the historic Spice Islands.
male.accessories: topi tiga negeri hat, ceremonial sword/parang salawaku, traditional jewelry

female.name: Pakaian Adat Aceh Wanita
female.description: Elegant and modest traditional female dress from Aceh. Features an embroidered long-sleeved blouse (baju meukasah) with intricate gold thread Aceh border embroidery (tekat), paired with a long wrapped skirt with matching gold embroidery borders. A woven silk songket shawl is draped over the head and shoulders modestly.
female.accessories: elaborate golden crown (kopiah meukeutop), gold jewelry, gold tekat embroidered accessories

male.name: Pakaian Adat Aceh Pria
male.description: Dignified traditional male attire from Aceh. Features a black or dark-colored long-sleeved embroidered jacket with gold Aceh-style embroidery borders, paired with matching pants and a rencong dagger at the waist. A kupiah meukeutop hat adorned with gold embroidery sits on the head. Represents Acehnese Islamic and royal heritage.
male.accessories: kopiah meukeutop hat, rencong dagger, gold embroidered accessories, matching songket sash
